THE OPERATOR BEHIND THE
STRATEGY.
Nearly a decade fixing execution inside Fortune 500 organizations — finding what's broken and actually fixing it. Now doing the same for growing businesses that need the work done without the full-time hire.
Engagement Options
Entry Point
Diagnostic & Roadmap
$5,000 – $10,000  ·  2–3 Weeks
Come in, assess what's actually happening, and deliver a clear picture of where execution is breaking and what to do about it. No assumptions. No pre-built frameworks forced on your business.
Best for: companies that know something is off but can't see it clearly from the inside.
Defined Scope
Project Engagement
$15,000 – $30,000  ·  4–8 Weeks
Defined scope, defined outcome. Integration work, systems installs, transformation lead, strategic project delivery. I own the execution from kickoff to handoff — and leave clean.
Best for: post-acquisition integration, transformation leads, critical project delivery.
Ongoing
Embedded Operator
$8,000 – $20,000/mo  ·  Ongoing
Part-time to full embedded. I operate alongside your leadership team — building visibility, driving execution, and making sure the strategy actually moves. Exit condition: your team runs it without me.
Best for: PE-backed companies, growth-stage businesses needing COO-level execution.
Guarantee
THE DIAGNOSTIC HAS TO CREATE REAL VALUE.

If the Diagnostic doesn't surface clear, actionable findings about where your execution is breaking — you don't pay. 100% return, invoke within 7 days of delivery.

If it leads to a project engagement, 50% of the diagnostic fee credits directly toward that scope — so what you paid to get clear works for you twice.

The point is simple: buy clarity first, then decide whether it makes sense to keep going together.

Always Included
+
Honest assessment of what's actually happening — including what nobody else is saying
+
Systems built around how your business works, not a standard playbook
+
Executive-level communication throughout — no translation layer needed
+
Clean handoff — your team operates independently when I leave
